productDisplayName: Puma Women Body Train White Sports Shoes
description: These BodyTrain sports shoes from puma are designed to maximise your exercise results. Soft padding inside gives your foot a comfortable ride, but it's the curved sole which is the star player. Engineered to tone your legs while you walk, these shoes activate leg muscles you didn't know you had! Upper Heavily meshed upper with synthetic overlays for maximum breathability Lace-ups for a snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Ever Foam textile lining for extra padded comfort Brand name and cat logo on the tongue Padded footbed, which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Eco Ortholite midsole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning, plus being made of a new environmentally friendly material Outsole TPR outsole that is ergonomically curved and has waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction EverRide technology in the forefoot and EverTrack technology in the backfoot for best results Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
